title: SugarCraft — CandyPty
description: CandyPty: pseudo-terminal primitive — open / spawn / read / write / resize. PHP port of charmbracelet/x/xpty (Linux + macOS).
ogDescription: Pseudo-terminal primitive — spawn child processes wired to a controlled PTY, with resize forwarding and non-blocking I/O.
tagline: Pseudo-terminal primitive — open / spawn / read / write / resize
detailMeta: port of x/xpty linux + macos ext-ffi posix_openpt tiocswinsz sigwinch
